mapper.select:
SELECT
S.SURVEY_NO AS surveyNo, S.SURVEY_NM AS surveyNm, S.SURVEY_CN AS surveyCn, S.SURVEY_TY_CD AS surveyTypeCd, S.SURVEY_QITEM_CN AS surveyQitemCn,
TO_CHAR(S.SURVEY_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS surveyBgngDt,
TO_CHAR(S.SURVEY_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS surveyEndDt,
S.SURVEY_STTS_CD AS surveySttsCd, S.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId, S.APT_CD AS aptCd,
NVL(R.PARTICIPANT_COUNT, 0) AS participantCount,
ROUND( ( NVL(R.PARTICIPANT_COUNT, 0) / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM APT_DETAIL AD
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
WHERE AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = S.APT_CD ), 0 ) ) * 100, 2 ) AS answerRate
FROM SURVEY S
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SURVEY_NO, COUNT(DISTINCT HO_NO) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT FROM SURVEY_RSPNS GROUP BY SURVEY_NO ) R ON R.SURVEY_NO = S.SURVEY_NO
WHERE S.APT_CD = #{aptCd}
ORDER BY S.SURVEY_BGNG_DT DESC

SELECT
SURVEY_NO AS surveyNo, SURVEY_NM AS surveyNm, SURVEY_CN AS surveyCn, SURVEY_TY_CD AS surveyTypeCd, SURVEY_QITEM_CN AS surveyQitemCn, SURVEY_BGNG_DT AS surveyBgngDt, SURVEY_END_DT AS surveyEndDt, SURVEY_STTS_CD AS surveySttsCd, RGTR_ID AS rgtrId, APT_CD AS aptCd
FROM SURVEY
WHERE SURVEY_NO = #{surveyNo}
mapper.update:
UPDATE SURVEY SET
SURVEY_NM = #{surveyNm}, SURVEY_CN = #{surveyCn}, SURVEY_TY_CD = #{surveyTypeCd}, SURVEY_QITEM_CN = #{surveyQitemCn}, SURVEY_BGNG_DT = TO_DATE(#{surveyBgngDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
SURVEY_END_DT = TO_DATE(#{surveyEndDt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
SURVEY_STTS_CD = #{surveySttsCd}, MDF_DT = SYSDATE
WHERE SURVEY_NO = #{surveyNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT
S.SURVEY_NO AS "surveyNo", S.SURVEY_NM AS "surveyNm", S.SURVEY_CN AS "surveyCn", S.SURVEY_TY_CD AS "surveyTypeCd", S.SURVEY_STTS_CD AS "surveySttsCd",
DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(S.SURVEY_QITEM_CN, 4000, 1) AS "surveyQitemCn",
TO_CHAR(S.SURVEY_BGNG_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "surveyBgngDt",
TO_CHAR(S.SURVEY_END_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "surveyEndDt",
NVL(R.PARTICIPANT_COUNT, 0) AS "participantCount",
ROUND( NVL( ( R.PARTICIPANT_COUNT * 100 ) / NULLIF( ( SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM HSHLD_HEAD HM
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HM.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO
WHERE MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = S.APT_CD ), 0 ), 0 ), 1) AS "answerRate",
( SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM HSHLD_HEAD HM
INNER JOIN APT_DETAIL AD ON AD.HO_NO = HM.HO_NO
INNER JOIN APT_UNIT AU ON AU.DONG_NO = AD.DONG_NO
INNER JOIN MGMT_OFFICE MO ON AU.APT_CMPLEX_NO = MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO
WHERE MO.APT_CMPLEX_NO = S.APT_CD
) AS "totalResident"
FROM SURVEY S LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SURVEY_NO, COUNT(DISTINCT USER_NO) AS PARTICIPANT_COUNT FROM SURVEY_RSPNS GROUP BY SURVEY_NO ) R ON R.SURVEY_NO = S.SURVEY_NO
WHERE S.SURVEY_NO = #{surveyNo}

SELECT
SURVEY_NO surveyNo, SURVEY_NM surveyNm, SURVEY_CN surveyCn, SURVEY_TY_CD surveyTypeCd, SURVEY_QITEM_CN surveyQitemCn, SURVEY_BGNG_DT surveyBgngDt, SURVEY_END_DT surveyEndDt, SURVEY_STTS_CD surveySttsCd, RGTR_ID rgtrId, APT_CD aptCd
FROM SURVEY
WHERE SURVEY_TY_CD = #{type} AND SURVEY_STTS_CD = 'OPEN' AND APT_CD = #{aptCd}
ORDER BY SURVEY_BGNG_DT DESC

SELECT
QITEM_NM AS "QITEM_NM", ANSR_CN AS "ANSR_CN", ANSR_CNT AS "ANSR_CNT"
FROM SURVEY_RSLT
WHERE SURVEY_NO = #{surveyNo}
ORDER BY QITEM_NM, ANSR_CNT DESC

SELECT
QITEM_NM AS "qitemNm", ANSR_CN AS "ansrCn", ANSR_CNT AS "ansrCnt"
FROM SURVEY_RSLT
WHERE SURVEY_NO = #{surveyNo}
ORDER BY QITEM_NM, ANSR_CNT DESC

SELECT
M.USER_NM AS "userNm",
DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR( SR.RSPNS_CN, 4000, 1 ) AS "rspnsCn"
FROM SURVEY_RSPNS SR
INNER JOIN MEMBER M ON SR.USER_NO = M.USER_NO
WHERE SR.SURVEY_NO = #{surveyNo}
ORDER BY SR.REG_DT DESC
